zh.lifeSummary: 當Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg於1151年出生在匈牙利托爾納托爾納時，他的父親Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary21歲，母親Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné21歲。他和Irene De Byzance至少有1個兒子。他去世於1210年在匈牙利享年59歲，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Géza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jesus, Jose, Arturo, Cesar, Enrique, Manuel, Miguel, Alfredo, Fernando, Jaime, Javier.  Arabic/Muslim Syed, Ali, Mohammed, Hadi, Karim, Kazim, Shabana, Sultan, Abbas, Abdul, Ahmed, Amir.
Galician: habitational name from any of the three places so named, in Ourense province, Galicia (Spain).
Portuguese: from a derivative of rezar ‘to pray’.

variants.name: Raza
meanings: ‘pleasing’. Three famous bearers of the name are known:  Parasurama  ‘Rama of the axe’, the sixth incarnation of Vishnu;  Balarama  ‘the strong Rama’, elder brother of Krishna and eighth incarnation of Vishnu; and above all  Ramachandra , seventh incarnation of Vishnu, whose story is told in the Ramayana.

variants.name: Rizvi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Syed, Ali, Arshad, Hasan, Shakeel, Abbas, Akbar, Saiyid, Abid, Adnan, Anwar, Asif.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from a derivative of the personal name Rizā, an Urdu variant of Persian Reza , denoting descent from or association with Ali al-Reza, the eighth imam of the Shiites. Compare Razvi .

variants.name: Razavi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Amir, Ali, Hossein, Mehdi, Abbas, Behzad, Masoud, Ramin, Ahmad, Asghar, Azam, Behnaz.

Muslim (Iran): from a Persian variant of Arabic Raḍawī, a derivative of the personal name Riḍā' (Persian Reza ), denoting descent from or association with ‘Alī al-Riḍā (Persian ‘Alī al-Rezā), the eighth imam of the Shiite Muslims.

variants.name: Reda
meanings: Shortened form of   Etheldreda  , quite commonly used as an independent given name in the 19th century, when the longer form was also in fashion. It has survived slightly better than the four-syllable original, but is nevertheless now rare.

variants.name: Rezai
meanings: Muslim (Iran and Afghanistan): surname denoting descent from or association with someone called   Reza  .

en.lifeSummary: When Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg was born in 1151, in Tolna, Tolna, Hungary, his father, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, was 21 and his mother, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Irene De Byzance. He died in 1210, in Hungary, at the age of 59, and was buried in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg est né en 1151, à Tolna, Tolna, Hongrie, son père, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Irene De Byzance. Il est décédé en 1210, à Hongrie, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie.

de.Hungry: Hungry Bentley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg 1151 in Tolna, Tolna, Ungarn geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary 21 und seine Mutter Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné 21. Er hatte mit Irene De Byzance mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ungarn und wurde in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg è nato il nel 1151 nel Tolna, Tolna, Ungheria, il suo padre, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Irene De Byzance. Morì nel 1210, nel Ungheria, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria.

ja.lifeSummary: Árpád-házi Géza Magyar hercegが1151年にハンガリートルナトルナで生まれた時，父Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungaryは21歳，母Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királynéは21歳であった。彼はIrene De Byzanceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年にハンガリーで59歳で死去し，ハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg(이)가 1151년 헝가리 톨나 톨나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Irene De Byzance(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 헝가리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 헝가리 프je르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Árpád-házi Géza Magyar herceg родился в 1151 г. в местности толна, толна, Венгрия, его отцу по имени Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Irene De Byzance. Он умер в 1210 г. в местности Венгрия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия.
